aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and local SEO optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to collect and display customer reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords for better search visibility.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions and location-specific pages.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has JSON-LD and Microdata schema types implemented.
gbp_analysis.summary: While schema markup is present, it is not fully utilized to enhance Google Business Profile (GBP) visibility. The lack of GBP integration and customer reviews is a significant drawback.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile or reviews.
Insufficient structured data to support local SEO and GBP optimization.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the web, which hampers local search visibility.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Claim and verify the business on major local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Regularly update and monitor NAP citations for accuracy.

schema_gaps: No Service schema with detailed service descriptions
No Review schema to showcase customer feedback

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive content and structured data to support AI-driven search algorithms.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: AI search algorithms due to insufficient content depth and lack of semantic markup.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement detailed Service schema and expand content to include FAQs and location-specific information.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establish the business as an authority in the HVAC niche by creating high-quality, informative content and actively managing online reputation.

page_title: A white background with a few lines on it
